name: American Express Platinum Travel Credit Card

fees.waiverCondition: Spend ₹1,90,000 or more in the previous year for fee reversal via travel voucher

categoryRates.description: 5X Membership Rewards points on domestic and international flights booked via AmexTravel.in
2X Membership Rewards points on all international spending

redemptionOptions: Transfer to airline partners (1:1 for InternMiles at 18,000 MR = 18,000 miles)
Gift vouchers via Amex Reward Multiplier

welcomeBenefits.condition: On payment of joining fee and first transaction

milestoneBenefits.benefit: Travel voucher worth ₹5,000 (effectively waives annual fee)

additionalBenefits: 24/7 Global Assist Hotline for travel emergencies
Amex Offers with curated merchant discounts
Complimentary Boingo Wi-Fi access at select airports
Extended warranty on purchases (up to 1 additional year)
pros: Strong milestone benefits effectively make the card free
5X rewards on flights booked via AmexTravel.in
Transfer to multiple airline loyalty programs
Generous welcome benefit covers joining fee
cons: Amex acceptance is limited in India compared to Visa/Mastercard
Base earn rate of 1 MR per ₹50 is below average
3.5% foreign currency markup is standard but not competitive
Annual fee of ₹5,000 is higher than joining fee
idealFor: Travellers who book flights and hotels frequently
Users who can hit milestone spends for fee reversal
Those who value comprehensive travel insurance

faqs.question: Is the annual fee really waivable?
faqs.answer: Not waived directly, but if you spend ₹1,90,000 in a year, you get a travel voucher worth ₹5,000 which effectively offsets the annual fee. Spending ₹4,00,000 gets you an additional ₹7,000 voucher.

faqs.question: Where is Amex accepted in India?
faqs.answer: Amex acceptance has improved significantly, covering most large merchants, online stores (Amazon, Flipkart, Swiggy, etc.), and restaurants. However, smaller merchants and some utility billers may not accept it.

faqs.question: Can I transfer Membership Rewards to airline miles?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can transfer MR points to InternMiles (InterMiles), Singapore Airlines KrisFlyer, and other partner programs. Transfer ratios vary by partner.

faqs.question: How does Amex Travel work?
faqs.answer: AmexTravel.in is Amex's own travel booking portal. Booking flights through it earns 5X MR points. You can also use MR points to pay for bookings on the portal.
